title: polygala peplis
intro: Polygala peplis, also known as European knapweed, is a perennial herb belonging to the family Polygalaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Polygala peplis include its potential to help manage stress, improve sleep quality, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its benefits, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
